title: Musical punts Mossel Bay
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Together with the Mossel...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Together with the Mossel Bay Municipality, Mossel Bay Tourism, the Heritage Theatre and Eden FM, writer and poet Chilli Bruintjies will be staging a musical titled 'Mossel Bay Dream Holiday' at the Mossel Bay Town Hall at 19:00 on 22 and 23 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Together with the Mossel Bay Municipality, Mossel Bay Tourism, the Heritage Theatre and Eden FM, writer and poet Chilli Bruintjies will be staging a musical titled 'Mossel Bay Dream Holiday' at the Mossel Bay Town Hall at 19:00 on 22 and 23 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The musical forms part of the municipality's Arts Month.","html":"The musical forms part of the municipality's Arts Month."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bruintjies wrote and composed it to promote our town as a highly attractive holiday destination of choice."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Mossel Bay Dream Holiday' will capture the ultimate holiday experience, embracing the defining features for which Mossel Bay are renowned and mirroring the scenic beauty, the wonderful people and the lovely atmosphere.","html":"'Mossel Bay Dream Holiday' will capture the ultimate holiday experience, embracing the defining features for which Mossel Bay are renowned and mirroring the scenic beauty, the wonderful people and the lovely atmosphere."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The production will also feature the appealing holiday facilities, attractions and activities on offer.","html":"The production will also feature the appealing holiday facilities, attractions and activities on offer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bruintjies has selected a great line-up of local singers, rappers, dancers and musicians to make this musical a wonderful experience. To compliment it, amazing video material of Mossel Bay shot at various locations will be added.","html":"Bruintjies has selected a great line-up of local singers, rappers, dancers and musicians to make this musical a wonderful experience. To compliment it, amazing video material of Mossel Bay shot at various locations will be added."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The production will also provide a platform for local artists to showcase their talent and creativity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Admission is R40 for adults and R20 for children. Braaivleis and potjiekos will be available to buy. Enquiries: Bruintjies on 064 698 3420.","html":"Admission is R40 for adults and R20 for children. Braaivleis and potjiekos will be available to buy. Enquiries: Bruintjies on 064 698 3420."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
